title: Tears and defiance as Lebanese family bury child, 11, killed in Israeli strike
summary_full: Jawad Younes and his uncle Ragheb were laid to rest on Saturday after their family compound was hit a day earlier.
summary_public: Jawad Younes and his uncle Ragheb were laid to rest on Saturday after their family compound was hit a day earlier.
